creator: wcarson.bugzilla@disillusion.net
text:
net-mgmt/unifi7 will build successfully using JAVA_VERSION=17, but upon launching you'll receive  a ton of errors. Changing to JAVA_VERSION=11 built & ran just fine on RockPro64, aarch64, 13.1-RELEASE-p5 with ports tree Wed Dec 21 21:16:58 2022 +0000.

Here is the huge paste of Java errors at startup with Java 17:

$ egrep -v '^ ' javalog
